Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are constructing a DECLARE model for the given scenario The DECLARE model is a dictionary with keys for different types of constraints We have two types of constraints unary constraints existence absence exactly one init and binary constraints the rest

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For unary constraints the value is a dictionary with activity as key and a tuple support confidence For binary constraints the inner dictionary has tuples activity1 activity2 as keys and support confidence as values

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets assume we have the following constraints in mind for the scenario

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For example every product idea must go through Idea Generation and Final Launch is optional Actually not every idea may be launched But lets assume we are modeling a successful process that ends with FL

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: But lets assume we are modeling a successful process that ends with FL However note that in DECLARE existence constraint on FL would mean that FL must occur at least once

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Since the scenario says Consider a complex multi department product design and launch process and the activities include FL we assume that we are modeling the full process until launch

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Each product idea goes through a series of steps before it is finally launched So we assume that in the traces we are modeling the product is launched

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets set existence for IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets set exactly one for AG and FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We assume the following order IG then DD then TFC and CE then PC then LT then UT then AG then MP then FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can enforce response IG DD DD TFC DD CE TFC PC CE PC PC LT LT UT UT AG AG MP MP FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can use precedence DD IG TFC DD CE DD PC TFC PC CE LT PC UT LT AG UT MP AG FL MP

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can set succession for the same pairs as response and precedence

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We want immediate succession for some pairs For example after AG immediately MP

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Chainresponse AG MP and MP FL Chainprecedence MP AG and FL MP Chainsuccession AG MP and MP FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We want that after PC the next activity must be LT and no other PC until LT So altresponse PC LT altprecedence LT PC altsuccession PC LT

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We want that after FL no other activity occurs So for every activity except FL we set nonsuccession FL activity

Name: Validation - IND
Text: We will create a dictionary for each key even if empty

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will set existence for every activity exactly one AG and FL init IG responded existence response precedence succession chainresponse chainprecedence chainsuccession altresponse altprecedence altsuccession and nonsuccession The rest are empty dictionaries
